chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.2952 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.15644/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply at Flag ‘’A’’ 3. For orders on M.A. No.15645/2025 (Ex/A). 4. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 28.10.2025 Mr. Umar Farooq, Advocate for Applicant a/w applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Amir Ali Shaikh son of Nisar Ahmed Shaikh seeks protective bail in FIR No.1302/2025 under Section-489-F PPC, registered at P.S A-Division, District Okara. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicant/accused is innocent and has been falsely implicated with malafide intention; that the applicant has issued a security cheque to the complainant as a result of business dealing; that prior to this bail application, the applicant has filed bail application No.2392/2025 and this Court granted protective bail for 20 days vide order dated 16.09.2025 but due to ailment he could not surrender before the trial Court. Now he wishes to surrender before the trial Court for his bail but apprehends of his arrest, hence this application for protective/transitory bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 15 days from today i.e 28.10.2025 to 11.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees Twenty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court.

Now he wishes to surrender before the trial Court for his bail but apprehends of his arrest, hence this application for protective/transitory bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 15 days from today i.e 28.10.2025 to 11.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees Twenty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 15 days period i.e. 11.11.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
